description: Sediment-metal enrichment associated with mine tailings, ore processing and alluvial disturbance.
notes: Primary source for As and Hg.

description: Drainage from dense settlement, workshops, markets, roads, stormwater and light industry.
notes: Primary source for Pb, Zn, Cu and Cd in urban basins.

description: Fertiliser, agrochemical, irrigation-return and eroded cultivated soil inputs.
notes: Moderate source plausibility for Cd, Mn and mixed loads.

description: Natural geologic and mineralogical control on sediment composition.
notes: Important for Al, Fe, Cr and Ni normalization/background.

description: Harbour activity, antifouling, marine deposition, estuarine mixing and port-linked urban activity.
notes: Relevant to Tema, Takoradi and coastal lagoons.
